block.description: Fit the button's span to its parent container span.

color.description: Button color. Preset values: default, primary, danger, blue, purple, cyan, green, magenta, pink, red, orange, yellow, volcano, geekblue, lime, gold. Also accepts custom hex color strings.

ghost.description: Make the button's background transparent when true.

href.description: The URL to redirect to when the button is clicked. Useful when used with a type link button.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to use icon in button.

title.description: Title text on the button - supports html.

type.description: Deprecated - use color and variant instead. The button type.

variant.description: Button visual variant. When set, takes precedence over type.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

onClick.description: Trigger action when button is clicked.
